Appearances:
Plaintiff Janice Fiore is present.
Attorney Marina Franco appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Nina alter is present.
Attorney Alex Trimble representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of NOV-19-2012 is vacated.
